title: Add export from SQLite records into portable JSON bundles
summary: Add export from SQLite records into portable JSON bundles
acceptanceCriteria: SQLite persistence exposes schema versioning and migration behavior.
Local JSON records can be imported and exported through portable bundles.
Integrity checks identify malformed or duplicate repository state.
reviewNotes: Implemented in the Hermes OS native command, task-generation, dashboard, persistence, scheduled review, runtime policy, template registry, and execution-readiness work already recorded in docs/hermes-os-integration-log.md.
